payload.objective: Run bounded native-checkpoint generation/NLL quality for the measured score24/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax profile after the reduced-replica Llama7B recost improved on score32/w16.

decoder_contract.attention_mixed_int8_score24_w16_rtl_exa: Run a bounded native-checkpoint generation/NLL gate for the measured score24/w16 RTL exact-divide softmax profile. This removes the quality-linkage inference from qkv8_float_exact before treating the score24/w16 PPA recost as a frontier point.
